advancements.wcwt.wireless_comprehensive: Obtain an ME Wireless Comprehensive Work Terminal.
wcwt.config.title: AE2 WCWT Config
wcwt.config.clientNotLoaded.tooltip: Forge has not loaded wcwt-client.toml yet. Reopen this screen later.
wcwt.config.serverNotLoaded.tooltip: SERVER config is world-scoped. After joining a world or server, it appears at saves/<world>/serverconfig/wcwt-server.toml.
wcwt.config.toolkitSlotCount.tooltip: Minimum 11 keeps the first 11 dedicated tool slots available. Saving the file usually applies without restart.
wcwt.config.patternProviderActiveRefresh: On: refresh provider rows continuously while pattern management is visible. Off: refresh only on request for steadier performance.
wcwt.config.patternUploadFailFallbackToE: Prefer edit slot on upload failure
Off: fall back to the pattern cache first, then the pattern edit slot if the cache is full. On: fall back to the pattern edit slot first.
Off: normal clicks only. Saving the file usually applies without restart.
wcwt.config.patternMultiplierApplyToEdit: Apply pattern multiplier to editor processing pattern

On: the batch pattern multiplier also changes the current processing pattern input/output amounts and output rotation in the pattern editor. Off: it only affects encoded patterns in the pattern cache.
wcwt.config.preferJeiBookmarksForPattern: Prefer JEI bookmarks for pattern encoding transfer

On: when JEI transfers ingredients from WCWT into the pattern encoding area, if an input has multiple valid item choices, prefer matching items from the JEI bookmark list first, in bookmark order. Off: use the existing WCWT/AE2 selection logic only.
wcwt.config.autoSwitchManualWorkspaceOnR: Auto-switch manual workspace on recipe transfer
On: JEI/EMI transfers switch the manual workspace to crafting or smithing when the recipe type is known.
wcwt.config.enableRecipePullTransfer.too: On: enable WCWT JEI/EMI recipe pull, pattern encoding transfer, and preview highlights. Off: disable them.
wcwt.config.expandToolkitInManagementAre: On: opening the toolkit shows it in the pattern management area and hides provider rows. Off: keep the original right-side toolkit panel.
